name: Develop:Brighton
description: Develop:Brighton is one of the UK's leading games industry conferences, bringing together developers, publishers, and service providers from across the country and beyond. The three-day event features talks, panels, and workshops covering game design, programming, art, audio, business, and more. While not a Scottish event, it is widely attended by Scottish studios and professionals and serves as an important networking opportunity for the UK-wide games community.
short_description: One of the UK's leading games industry conferences held annually in Brighton.
